citation.description: All uses: lines pin to 40-char SHAs, e.g. actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0. test_release_workflow_pins.py::test_all_uses_are_full_sha_pinned enforces this.

criteria.criterion: Every `uses:` in `release.yml` references a full 40-char commit SHA with a trailing version comment — enforced by `zizmor` (via `make lint`)

citation.description: persist-credentials: false on build job checkout (line 63) and mcp_registry checkout (line 224). Two checkouts, two disable entries.

criteria.criterion: Every release checkout sets `persist-credentials: false` — enforced by `zizmor` (via `make lint`)

citation.description: lint target runs zizmor $(RELEASE_WORKFLOW) and actionlint via actionlint-bin with pinned version + SHA-256 verify. pyproject.toml line 188 pins zizmor==1.27.0 in [dev]. release.yml line 214 has exactly one zizmor:ignore[excessive-permissions] with correct rationale.

criteria.criterion: `zizmor` + `actionlint` run under `make lint` scoped to `release.yml`; `zizmor` pinned in `pyproject.toml [dev]`; `actionlint` installed via pinned-version download with SHA-256 verification; single annotated suppression for mcp_registry excessive-permissions

citation.description: pip install --require-hashes --no-deps -r .github/release-requirements.txt; pip list --format=freeze > tool-versions.txt; uploaded as evidence-build artifact. .github/release-requirements.txt exists with hashes for build/hatchling/twine and transitive deps.

criteria.criterion: Release build tools install from `.github/release-requirements.txt` with `--require-hashes`; install step emits `pip list --format=freeze > tool-versions.txt` into evidence artifact

citation.description: BASE_ALLOWLIST = {pip, setuptools, wheel}. Parsed comparison via _parse_pins(). test_check_build_env_locked.py covers clean/extra-package/version-mismatch/case-insensitive cases. release.yml line 79-81 wires check_build_env_locked.py.

criteria.criterion: `scripts/check_build_env_locked.py` performs a parsed comparison (pip freeze vs lock name==version entries), fails on any unlocked package, modulo {pip,setuptools,wheel} allowlist; test_release_workflow_pins.py check (h) asserts guard step is wired; unit test covers clean+fail cases

citation.description: python -m build --no-isolation at line 82. test_release_workflow_pins.py::test_build_uses_no_isolation asserts --no-isolation, --require-hashes, and .github/release-requirements.txt are present.

criteria.criterion: Hatchling's version is enforced via `--no-isolation` against the pre-installed hash-locked env; `test_release_workflow_pins.py` fails if `--no-isolation` is removed

citation.description: mcp_verify (lines 159-204) has permissions: contents: read only, no id-token. mcp_registry (lines 206-281) has id-token: write, needs: [publish, mcp_verify], runs chmod +x mcp-publisher at line 231. test_mcp_publisher_pin.py tests corrupted archive -> non-zero.

criteria.criterion: MCP publisher pinned to exact version; digest verified in unprivileged `mcp_verify` job (no id-token:write); `mcp_registry` needs mcp_verify and runs chmod +x mcp-publisher; test_mcp_publisher_pin.py verifies corrupted byte -> non-zero exit

citation.description: Ticket comment records: pinned URL = https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry/releases/download/v1.8.0/mcp-publisher_linux_amd64.tar.gz; pinned SHA256 = 1370446bbe74d562608e8005a6ccce02d146a661fbd78674e11cc70b9618d6cf; downloaded = 1370446bbe74d562608e8005a6ccce02d146a661fbd78674e11cc70b9618d6cf (7337300 bytes); RESULT: OK. Specific URL, digest, and byte-count are all named. Digest also confirmed against upstream checksums.txt.

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] The embedded SHA-256 is correct for the pinned URL: make verify-mcp-pin downloads the URL, computes SHA-256, asserts equality; implementer records passing output on ticket

citation.description: evidence_shapin job uploads evidence-shapin; build job uploads evidence-build; mcp_verify job uploads evidence-mcp (with version+digest written to evidence-mcp.txt). consolidate_evidence job downloads evidence-* pattern and concatenates to release-evidence.txt. test_release_workflow_pins.py::test_evidence_fragments_and_consolidation asserts all three fragment names and release-evidence.txt.

criteria.criterion: Release-evidence pipeline: each job uploads a distinctly-named fragment (evidence-shapin/evidence-build/evidence-mcp); consolidation job concatenates into release-evidence.txt; test_release_workflow_pins.py check (f) asserts fragment names + write commands + consolidation wiring

citation.description: Pinning section at line 77. Contains full-SHA at line 88, pip-compile --generate-hashes at line 114, MCP publisher at line 120. test_release_workflow_pins.py::test_docs_pinning_section asserts all three.

criteria.criterion: `docs/releasing.md` contains a Pinning section with: (a) full-SHA rationale, (b) pip-compile --generate-hashes command, (c) MCP publisher pin update instructions — test_release_workflow_pins.py asserts all three substrings

citation.description: Ticket comment: change 709 (Change-Id I9a31d6a) LANDED on main via Gerrit — status MERGED — with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1. GitHub Actions CI green on both ubuntu + macos matrix legs. make lint + typecheck clean. Held-out oracle: 16 passed / 3 skipped.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass, and the change lands via the Gerrit two-vote gate
